mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO stock_stk_limit (ts_code, trade_date, pre_close, up_limit, down_limit) VALUES
(#{item.tsCode}, #{item.tradeDate}, #{item.preClose}, #{item.upLimit}, #{item.downLimit})
mapper.delete:
DELETE FROM stock_stk_limit WHERE
(ts_code = #{item.tsCode} AND trade_date = #{item.tradeDate})
mapper.select: SELECT ts_code, MAX(trade_date) AS latest_trade_date FROM stock_stk_limit GROUP BY ts_code
